consolidation: 16 Danilo tabs → 7 content files + 1 dialogue summary + 1 workshop summary + 1 OpKit

hypothesis_links.note: M8 is foundational infrastructure, not a hypothesis test. Brand positioning decisions inform how we communicate hypotheses (e.g., HYP-006 churn rate may benefit from strong brand voice/unboxing; HYP-003 marine plasma category viability depends on positioning clarity), but M8 itself doesn't validate or invalidate business assumptions.

key_blockers: Lab-verified Supplement Facts Panel (CRITICAL — cannot print packaging without supplier CoA + third-party ICP-MS analysis)
Prop 65 heavy metal testing (CRITICAL — cannot sell in California without testing or warning)
Trademark clearance (CRITICAL — cannot print 'IonWave' on packaging without USPTO clearance)
Domain acquisition (CRITICAL — cannot launch without ionwave.com or fallback)
next_action: Execute 6 CRITICAL blockers in Week 1-2: (1) Domain check (ionwave.com availability), (2) USPTO trademark search ('IonWave' Class 005), (3) Commission logo designer ($500-2K), (4) Book brand photoshoot ($3-5K), (5) Legal review of all label copy (FDA consultant $2-5K), (6) Lab testing (supplier CoA + third-party Supplement Facts Panel verification + Prop 65)

intelligence_gaps.impact: Can't print packaging without exact mineral values (FDA requirement)
Can't sell in California without testing or warning
Can't launch brand without logo (packaging, website, ads)
Can't build website, ads, or packaging mockups without images
Can't print 'IonWave' on packaging without USPTO clearance
Legal risk if claims violate supplement regulations
intelligence_gaps.validation_path: Hire FDA consultant ($2-5K), review all files

intelligence_gaps.impact: Core differentiation claim is D-grade without study
intelligence_gaps.validation_path: Commission bioavailability study OR cite peer-reviewed research

intelligence_gaps.impact: Emotional connection missing, brand feels corporate
Copywriters can't execute consistently with only 3 examples
intelligence_gaps.validation_path: Build graded example database, categorize by context

intelligence_gaps.impact: Messaging hierarchy not validated by real customers

intelligence_gaps.validation_path: Build content calendar, create post templates

intelligence_gaps.impact: Packaging, website, app (Phase 2+) need consistent icons

intelligence_gaps.validation_path: Research marine biologists, biohackers, endurance athletes

revisions.what_changed: Full M8 Brand Identity workshop: 16 Danilo tabs (Brand Guidelines, Tone of Voice, Visual Identity, Brand Story, Competitor Audit, Packaging Design/Brief/Analysis, Brand Naming, Domain Selection, Brand Tracking, Form Factor, Serving Size, Unboxing, Photo Brief, Social Media Guidelines) → 7 content files (brand_strategy, brand_voice_tone, packaging_design, brand_naming_domain, brand_messaging_storytelling, remaining_brand_systems, industry_perspectives) + dialogue summary (9 rounds, 5 upgrades) + workshop summary + OpKit. Research: 4 web searches (D2C brand identity 2026, marine plasma branding, packaging design, competitive voice analysis). Personas: Brand Strategist, CPG Designer, Copywriter. Key content: Positioning ('accessible marine plasma' Phase 1 → 'complete mineralization' Phase 2+), voice principles (5 core: Informed Guide archetype, science-backed not academic, explain don't gatekeep, transparency-first, conversational-professional), packaging system (sachet/box/mailer with FDA compliance checklist, Prop 65, sustainability strategy, unboxing flow with progress tracker), brand naming evaluation (IonWave trademark/domain strategy), messaging architecture (awareness ladder, 3 tagline variants, 5 social content pillars), visual identity (typography/color/logo brief/photo brief), 3-phase brand evolution model (Challenger → Category Ownership → Market Leader), competitor audit (LMNT/AG1/Momentous/Quinton positioning map), 3 contrarian takes. Quality 7.8/10: strong foundation with clear intelligence gaps (6 CRITICAL blockers: logo, photography, CoA, Prop 65, trademark, domain) and actionable upgrade paths documented.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strengths: Clear positioning ('accessible marine plasma'), well-defined voice principles (Informed Guide archetype, 5 core principles), FDA-aware packaging system (compliance checklist, Prop 65 strategy, sustainability trade-offs documented), unboxing-optimized experience (progress tracker added via dialogue), 3 strong contrarian takes, 3-phase brand evolution model. Weaknesses: CRITICAL BLOCKERS (6): no logo, no photography, no Supplement Facts Panel (CoA needed), no Prop 65 testing, no trademark clearance, no domain acquisition. Legal gaps: FDA claims not reviewed, absorption percentages unverified (98% vs 10-15% needs study or softening). Human dependencies: founder story missing (requires interview), customer testimonials unavailable (pre-launch), voice example library insufficient (3 examples, needs 50+). Score 7.8/10 reflects strong strategic foundation with clear execution gaps that are typical for pre-launch brand work (all gaps documented with upgrade paths). Upgrade to 8.5+: execute 6 CRITICAL blockers, legal review, absorption study, founder interview, voice example library expansion.

upgrades_applied: Sachet vs box messaging split (evergreen sachet, flexible box positioning)
Supplement Facts Panel escalated to CRITICAL blocker (not Phase 2 upgrade)
Absorption claims softened (98% → 'highly bioavailable ionic form', FDA-safe language)
Tagline separated by context (ads='78 Minerals. 30 Seconds. Zero BS.' vs packaging='Complete Mineralization, Simplified.')
Inside lid progress tracker added to unboxing experience (30-day checklist)
